_comment: Outscraper reviewsQuery search terms for pest-control in AU.
Only problems with video clip pools are included here.
IMPORTANT — matching behaviour: reviewsQuery passes through to Google's own review
text search. We BELIEVE it does whole-word matching (so 'roach' would NOT match
'cockroach') but this is unconfirmed. Test by searching a known cockroach review
with query='roach' vs 'cockroach' and comparing result counts.
Quoted phrases (e.g. '"rat infestation"') enforce phrase-level matching and are
safer for ambiguous stems. 'rat' alone would match 'grateful', 'brat', 'stratum' etc.
When building the search query, terms from ALL problems are concatenated (OR logic).
The winning problem is determined client-side by keyword hit count.
